invalidation.zh: 价格跌破0.125（基于ATR和近期低点）或资金费率Z-Score升至75%以上（显示多头过热）。
invalidation.en: Price breaks below 0.125 (based on ATR and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 75% (indicating overheated longs).

invalidation.zh: 价格跌破85000（基于ATR和关键支撑）或资金费率Z-Score升至70%以上（显示多头过热），则平仓。
invalidation.en: Close position if price breaks below 85000 (based on ATR and key support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 70% (indicating overheated longs).

invalidation.zh: 价格跌破124（基于ATR 2.8769和近期低点）或资金费率Z-Score升至50%以上（显示空头压力缓解）。
invalidation.en: Price breaks below 124 (based on ATR 2.8769 and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score rises above 50% (indicating reduced short pressure).
